data.description: Not just a great valley, but a shrine to human foresight, the strength of granite, the power of glaciers, the persistence of life, and the tranquility of the High Sierra.
data.directionsInfo: Yosemite is open year-round. Information on conditions and detours is available on the park website.
data.weatherInfo: Yosemite weather varies by elevation; check current conditions before visiting.
